channel.title: Lecture Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Lecture Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: 18901.pdf
item.description: Notes A: These Supplementary Notes are optional reading for the corresponding lecture sessions. (Notes courtesy of Dr. Joao P. Santos. Used with permission.)

item.title: Lecture Notes
item.description:
These Supplementary Notes are optional reading for the weeks listed in the table.

WEEK # TOPICS NOTES
1 Logic and Foundations Notes A (PDF) (Courtesy of Dr. Joao P. Santos. Used with permission.)
7 Connected Spaces, Compact Spaces Notes C (PDF)
9 Well-ordered Sets, Maximum Principle Notes B (PDF)
10 Countability and Separation Axioms Notes D (PDF)
11 Urysohn Lemma, Metrization Notes E (PDF)
